landing.heroEyebrow: Every photographers with a story to tell
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to tell your story
landing.feature1Desc: Discover the meaning of passing time, not just a frozen moment in a photograph. Build a narrative flow from beginning to end with chapters and sub-chapters, and seamlessly connect photo and text blocks to bring your story to life. Here, your unique story—woven frame by frame—unfolds.
landing.feature2Title: Even Faster with the Native Desktop App
landing.feature2Desc: Racconto supports both a web workspace and native apps for macOS and Windows. Simply connect a local folder on your computer once, and it will automatically detect and upload new photos, making your workflow more seamless than ever.
landing.feature3Desc: Great records are the foundation of a compelling story. Jot down project concepts, spontaneous ideas, and research for your narrative, then connect these notes directly to individual photos. Notes fully support modern Markdown syntax.
landing.feature4Desc: Go beyond simply uploading. Quickly sort and find the exact photos you need using star ratings, color labels, and linked project notes. It automatically extracts camera metadata to display EXIF information and supports folder-based filtering.
landing.feature5Desc: racconto.app/yourname — Your story becomes your portfolio. Share your narrative with the world through Racconto's dedicated portfolio pages. By automatically calculating image sizes and rendering an optimal layout, the portfolio adds a touch of beauty to your story.
landing.betaDesc: All features available during the free beta. No credit card required.
landing.betaLimit: Beta limits: 3 projects · 1,000 photos in total
landing.desktopOptimizationDesc: Racconto is optimized for desktop environments.

feature.featureDetailDesc: Everything you need to craft your story and bring meaning to your photos, all in one place
feature.feature1DetailDesc: Create chapters and weave photos together to complete your narrative. Drag and drop to reorder photos, and document chapter details.
feature.feature2DetailDesc: Native macOS and Windows apps are supported. Link a local folder, and the app will automatically detect and upload new photos every time it launches.
feature.feature3DetailDesc: Enjoy a free-form note-taking feature. Keep your shooting ideas, concepts, and research in one place, and leave memos linked to individual photos. Fully supports Markdown formatting.
feature.feature4DetailDesc: Categorize photos with color labels and star ratings, and automatically extract EXIF data. Conveniently sort through hundreds of photos.
feature.feature5DetailDesc: Publish your projects and set a username to customize your personal portfolio. Share your portfolio using your unique URL (/p/username).
